description: Please sketch a modern cylinder vacuum cleaner—featuring a rounded, compact body with prominent rear wheels, a top handle, an integrated controls panel, a flexible hose connection, and a telescopic wand leading to a floor head—from two different viewpoints. For each viewpoint, provide two distinct versions: a 'concept view' that retains all your initial perspective scaffolding, center axes, bounding boxes, intersecting ellipses, and internal cross-sectional lines, and a polished 'presentation view' that uses clean, confident contour lines with all underlying construction hidden. You should deliver a total of four sketches that clearly show your underlying structural thinking right next to the final, clean presentation.
